channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI wins have Alphabet poised to become world’s biggest company
item.description: Google’s parent closed Friday with a market capitalization of $4.8 trillion. Nvidia was below that level on Tuesday, but a three-day rally into the end of the week pushed it to $5.2 trillion. [Alphabet, Nvidia]

item.title: Stagflation Incoming: The Donald Ain’t Gonna Like What Happens Next!
item.description: Here is a salient place to start regarding the economic impact of the Donald’s misbegotten war on Iran: To wit, approximately 7 billion ton-miles of freight moves by truck each and every day in the USA, which heavy truck fleet consumes upwards of 2.9 million …

item.title: SK Hynix flooded with unprecedented offers from big tech firms to secure chip supplies
item.description: Global tech giants are making unprecedented offers to SK Hynix. They want to invest in new production lines and fund expensive equipment purchases. This is to secure vital memory chips. Demand for these chips is surging due to the artificial intelligence boom… [Intel]

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime's IPO gamble | TechCrunch
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part. [ServiceNow]

item.title: Alphabet poised to overtake Nvidia as world’s most valuable company
item.description: Alphabet's strategic AI advancements and custom chip development could reshape tech industry dynamics, challenging Nvidia's market position. The post Alphabet poised to overtake Nvidia as world’s most valuable company appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Alphabet, Nvidia]

item.title: NVIDIA’s Own AI Costs Now Exceed What It Pays Human Employees, VP Admits, as Compute Bills Spiral Across the Industry
item.description: AI is great for many tasks, but the costs to run AI are also exponentially higher than those of human workers, says NVIDIA. NVIDIA Highlights Large Cost of Running AI Versus Human Employees, While Suggesting That Humanity's Future Revolves Around The Adoption… [Nvidia, ServiceNow]

item.title: Top 5 ASX 200 Gainers in May 2026 Led by AI, Lithium and Tech Surge
item.description: SYDNEY — The S&P/ASX 200 has shown resilience in the first nine trading days of May 2026, climbing roughly 2.8% despite global volatility, with a handful of standout performers driving much of the gains. As artificial intelligence infrastructure demand, lithi… [Intel]

item.title: Nvidia, AI factories and the transition to accelerated computing
item.description: The market is trying to price a transition it hasn’t fully internalized. It sees Nvidia Corp.’s market cap with a five-handle and assumes the valuation is too high to grow further. We believe that’s the wrong mental model and it underestimates the market pote… [Nvidia]

item.title: Citizens Financial Group CEO Touts Private Bank Growth, $450M AI Efficiency Push
item.description: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) Chairman and CEO Bruce Van Saun said the bank is benefiting from a decade-long transformation since its 2014 public...

item.title: Microsoft’s African Data Center Falters on Payment Demands
item.description: A major Microsoft Corp. data center site in East Africa has been delayed by disagreements with the Kenyan government over the company’s request for guaranteed payments, people familiar with the matter said. [Microsoft]
